name: landing-page
description: This project provides an enhanced navigation menu system for Bootstrap 5, featuring split dropdown buttons, multi-level submenus, improved keyboard accessibility, and intelligent handling of link behavior based on the `href` attribute.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:scss
scripts.build:scss: sass scss/main.scss css/main.css --style compressed && postcss css/main.css --replace --use autoprefixer
